description: Repair verification set for C10 (e2 second symmetric polynomial). Includes C10 itself plus supporting Z3-family and related algebra facts to test whether the adapter generalises or overfits to one candidate.

facts.context: second elementary symmetric polynomial of pairwise distances in equal-mass 3-body figure-8
facts.notes: Primary target. Baseline margin = -1.67. Best distractor at baseline: r12^2+r13^2+r23^2 (truncation: drops cross-product terms).

facts.context: sum of pairwise distances in equal-mass 3-body figure-8 orbit
facts.notes: Positive control (C01/e1). Baseline margin = +4.50. Should remain positive after repair.

facts.context: first elementary symmetric polynomial of three variables a, b, c
facts.notes: Algebra anchor: does the adapter hurt on a clean algebraic fact the model should know.

facts.context: second elementary symmetric polynomial of three variables a, b, c
facts.notes: Same structure as C10 but in pure algebra. If oracle fails here at baseline, adapter target is confirmed as domain-specific not algebra-general.

facts.context: Newton's identity relating power sum p2 to elementary symmetric polynomials e1, e2
facts.notes: Newton's identity: relates to the same Z3 family. Tests whether the adapter generalises to adjacent algebra.
